untranslatable_reason: Signal requires calendar-based filtering (January month detection) and index membership filtering (S&P 600 small-cap classification). These are data/universe filters, not technical indicators from the allowed list. Additionally, the signal references mean-reversion properties and market downturn/recovery benefits but provides no quantifiable technical thresholds (all parameters marked AUTHOR_SILENT). The operators 'is' used above for calendar and index membership are not valid for technical indicator comparison and should be implemented as data filters external to the rule engine.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally a calendar-seasonal pattern rule combined with universe selection, not a technical indicator-based rule. The entry conditions cannot be expressed using only the allowed technical indicators and operators. Implementation would require: (1) calendar month filtering at the data/universe selection layer, (2) S&P 600 index membership validation, and (3) historical analysis to determine quantifiable mean-reversion thresholds (e.g., RSI, Bollinger Band positioning) that were not provided by the author.
